name: gurney-everyday-assistant
description: Unified everyday assistant: calendar, tasks, reminders, weather, briefings, and day-planning in one extension

name: gurney-websearch
description: Web search tool (LLM tool, no slash command)

name: gurney-memgraph
description: Long-term memory via FalkorDB (heavy — Standard/Heavy tier only)

name: gurney-routines
description: Routine suggestions learned from local extension data (asks before recurring nudges)

name: gurney-instant-responses
description: Templated instant replies for trivial chatter and tool-dispatch acknowledgements
